Logo Versions

Based on the crescent moon from tuyuesioxin.cn, adapted to RTMCN brand colors (#0FF0B3 green + #00D4FF blue)

Version 1

Moon icon + RTMCN inline

TMG moon on left, RTMCN text on right. Simple, matches tuyuesioxin.cn layout.

Version 2

Centered moon with glow + RTMCN

Moon sits above/centered, with glow effect. RTMCN text below. More prominent moon.

Version 3

Moon accent on M + tagline

Moon replaces the dot on M. "TRADEMARK REGISTRATION" tagline below. Creative integration.

Version 4

TUYUE full brand + moon + tagline

Uses full brand name "TUYUE" instead of RTMCN. Moon with TM inside. Clean and professional.

Context: How it looks in the nav bar

Reference: tuyuesioxin.cn moon logo

Gold moon with TMG letters — source style
